ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.pageNameText: Choose Where to Receive Your Payment(s)
ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.pageIntroText: Choose where and how you want to receive your payment(s).
ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.tipContentText: Get your payment faster when you choose direct deposit.
ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.noteText: Note: If you choose direct deposit, you confirm that you won't transfer your total payment(s) to a bank or financial agency located outside the United States. If you cannot confirm this, then choose to have a paper check mailed to you.

paymentDestinationTable.splitPaymentText2: Deductions may be taken from the payment.

rowText.directDepositDeliveryTypeText: Your money will be deposited 2–3 business days after the payment has been processed.

rowText.incorrectToolTipContentText2: Contact your local Human Resources representative. Then allow up to 7 days for your new information to be updated
rowText.postalAddressDeliveryTypeText: Typically, you should receive the paper check 5–7 business days after the payment has been processed.
Typically, you should receive the paper check 5–7 business days after the payment has been processed.

paymentDestinationTable.splitPaymentText2: Deductions may be taken from the payment.

ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.displayedPaymentText1: You can also choose to receive a portion of your payment at a second mailing address or financial institution.
ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.displayedPaymentText2: Enter the amount and then choose where to receive that portion of your payment.
ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.displayedPaymentText3: Deductions may be taken from the payment.
ChooseWheretoReceiveYourPayment.amountToSecondDestinationText2: Enter $0.00 if you don't want to send an amount to the second address.

rowText.directDepositDeliveryTypeText: Your money will be deposited 2–3 business days after the payment has been processed.

quitPopupHeadetText: What do you want to do?
saveContentText: Keep the choices you've made, so far. Finish making pension choices later.
quitContentText: Cancel your pension request and lose all the pension choices you've made, so far.
returnContentText: Go back to the current page without quitting.
